textByHashes.5c45a78b3306558d5cf6cd4268cb15965cc9b9b7: Please introduce yourself to our ruler, His Royal Greatness King Gjuki Sorvott IV.
textByHashes.9599743ce78217fdb2c77c69be77245d9956d2dc: Hello, . That cat really is a pain isn't he? Always interrupting the King.
textByHashes.54554a1e99b0aa5b4c6e052dda0ce66e939a6db5: Oh, go and talk to Flosi Dalksson in his shop. He'll have some tuna if you don't have any. You could also fish it from one of the spots round here, if you prefer.
textByHashes.49ded6ea48500073277d1f8c996ecaf48722eaf1: Sire, Sire! The Kelda merchants have arrived, they are three days early. We're not ready!
textByHashes.ecb4c66a7f68dd653a1c74d02b362822af4f8297: They are in the hall, eating and drinking us out of food and beer. It's costing us a fortune.
textByHashes.7c78776fa7974e4d21ce6a0855a02bdd90c473e8: I already have. They'll never get enough ore in time, the bunch of lazy no-good layabouts.
textByHashes.db601bdd16fdc360ef952c2d5f56a2fb0d9b3d76: We need six pieces of tin for Keldagrim's merchants.
textByHashes.e762cd7792a788db8ecdcfeb905ebaf9d9b3ced5: We need seven pieces of tin for Keldagrim's merchants.
textByHashes.eb0c9f0f5bc73cebd2371512786bb0d67ec49bda: We need eight pieces of tin for Keldagrim's merchants.
textByHashes.2524b9a88fb2b45d8ca11f6b8abffc97b60218a4: We need six pieces of coal for Keldagrim's merchants.
textByHashes.d8a170de6606e36f341408fb7d6ecdbd6a81079b: We need seven pieces of coal for Keldagrim's merchants.
textByHashes.4d24175bc0c92eddd6f826c378c3bb682a42ad3b: We need eight pieces of coal for Keldagrim's merchants.
textByHashes.41337564bd6e15c1e223df2970f325fe9b8e3ac2: We need six pieces of mithril for Keldagrim's merchants.
textByHashes.7fcccc808db62b4ede5fc6be2179282d32f68f35: We need seven pieces of mithril for Keldagrim's merchants.
textByHashes.1419df7550ea394cb60c03007420b721f3c51898: We need eight pieces of mithril for Keldagrim's merchants.
textByHashes.52a6f38a45d5c6855d6decd8e6ad9c710edca7d9: The entrance to our mines are to the north-east of the western gatehouse, outside the walls.
textByHashes.dd2de0f04f31a125e6233758dbd240d47fe8c679: If you bring us the ore, we won't ask where it came from. Don't worry we're discreet.
textByHashes.5e115dc084e14fa02c1f73684efa0050abd69775: Of course. Please bring six pieces of tin ore.
textByHashes.d2c58af65ec714ce99ae390ceb346bf58989a398: Of course. Please bring seven pieces of tin ore.
textByHashes.b7c5ad101d04e00eda17efeac3873080bfad98fd: Of course. Please bring eight pieces of tin ore.
textByHashes.210f041075e453c7f4598beaf27b234c3a80b7b7: Of course. Please bring six pieces of coal ore.
textByHashes.7b5dc559ff1c961fb23ef2f43a3c84e303e54ac1: Of course. Please bring seven pieces of coal ore.
textByHashes.24f7352f452fd133327572c90d812dde52df8098: Of course. Please bring eight pieces of coal ore.
textByHashes.02d43deb939e6145d7b33fa7c1e3f046514d22cf: Of course. Please bring six pieces of mithril ore.
textByHashes.108f7f4b3734baf93f9925c166bd4f431b91112f: Of course. Please bring seven pieces of mithril ore.
textByHashes.70228fca46f1d17fe9734434b1548dcab577fe83: Of course. Please bring eight pieces of mithril ore.
textByHashes.ca51543420677435c365b509f8c3fc2f53340a03: The entrance to the mines is outside the western gatehouse, on the north side of the town.
textByHashes.f0cc9bfac75ab5b5dcff959f86b96994ea8fdcab: Excellent. This man has gathered the six pieces of tin ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.685b3c02d3949e3a319707609820b967e7990f75: Excellent. This woman has gathered the six pieces of tin ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.e6167e91146f16d3e9470eb19484ebee6297a522: Excellent. This man has gathered the seven pieces of tin ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.81cba2ccba3d064da7e7fdd1dfe3a22195afb3e4: Excellent. This woman has gathered the seven pieces of tin ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.44c923f5d6d91261a73dc873cef5c410ef0c6dc7: Excellent. This man has gathered the eight pieces of tin ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.a3ad1c2eba4d945063d438d1b2afb5151f052f18: Excellent. This woman has gathered the eight pieces of tin ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.1e882d98d974710436f4741d6a21af5bd6d97e70: Excellent. This man has gathered the six pieces of coal ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.f7ee8f78aa77d5df2366d96a44918c1ebdba10de: Excellent. This woman has gathered the six pieces of coal ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.7c536b7dcf710b5e444ae88d096c04ad1334794f: Excellent. This man has gathered the seven pieces of coal ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.5fe4c9581738ed4f216f75a467504e470b06e4c8: Excellent. This woman has gathered the seven pieces of coal ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.3202672813349c853db6265244e0ad9c37097575: Excellent. This man has gathered the eight pieces of coal ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.43282e4c5c00dbf72902526a8d94dbd83586d62f: Excellent. This woman has gathered the eight pieces of coal ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.4e1c883e61d90e04e140350ee8d25d920bdc8973: Excellent. This man has gathered the six pieces of mithril ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.225caba61f017bdb1eb5cc81400a2ce95626dc38: Excellent. This woman has gathered the six pieces of mithril ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.2b8d08d798c910ba822b88750e6051d556c2f0a8: Excellent. This man has gathered the seven pieces of mithril ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.6d14160d4725573d97a508db9e00048d8c151eec: Excellent. This woman has gathered the seven pieces of mithril ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.765f4bfcc4400cee1386b6c573181ded88f1f1cf: Excellent. This man has gathered the eight pieces of mithril ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.eab31334ee29868f574318bb943dd14479284ffc: Excellent. This woman has gathered the eight pieces of mithril ore needed by Keldagrim's merchants, sire.
textByHashes.0d7634ba925eaa4433bc386bcb91528a8c0566eb: Thank you . If only our miners were as efficient as you.
textByHashes.8fb8bd89b2cb5df1a238ff43e8c02eea87da90cc: Have you completed your undercover mission to Neitiznot yet?
textByHashes.c2e5e65beb74a82723de1da180ec3fee5e453cc7: Then make sure you have your costume and go. There is no time to play around!
textByHashes.82ed6b8bad4fa1beeaa8b2fd1986d8bf29284633: I hope your mission was successful. Talk with the King, I'm sure he has some things he wishes to discuss with you.
textByHashes.06ff34d4a80c1d43e60c7945f7281ed3773e4ab3: That may be, but we are very different from the vermin on Neitiznot.
textByHashes.e95bb06859e2a81ee208b533fb14b030f68dd674: Would you like the financial report now, sir?
textByHashes.257d7ac34e42c3177318af74105154491e432392: Once we have paid for all the supplies you...err...I have ordered, your Royal Highness, then the coffers will be at their lowest ebb for some time. However, if we tighten our belts and delay your plans for extra
textByHashes.a31fd1bb48fa565bbc774843ebe25aaf6c8b6978: But we have already collected Island Taxes this month! We'll never persuade anyone to pay it. Everyone is surviving on coppers as it is.
textByHashes.f5bd730e7454b9f86f2cbd9604dbafa433c0d888: How am I going to sell this one?
textByHashes.6b3a717c7cc406246fe63369f54bb6d1b3270117: Shhh! Please whisper, ! For both our sakes just agree, otherwise he'll get into one of his moods, and who knows what he'll pronounce.
textByHashes.c06f26b4736cba381d849d4ddf47354f45823841: You don't have space for the King's tax bag.
textByHashes.53c03d88266136d7e9230bdd80add2ea232c9927: How is this island supposed to develop if we keep spending all our money on his paranoid schemes?
textByHashes.00ee6c430f81702df5f853132aebeb64e65abcc5: You need to speak with some of the citizens of Jatizso and collect their taxes.
textByHashes.5ddcd0392985920e9acc346de4364277509a9d5c: Count the number of windows on each building and tax the people who work inside. 1000 per window.
textByHashes.1d76976f330ce651183999e482f3640ca56f6297: The only people who earn any real money on the island are shopkeepers. Soldiers clearly do not need to be taxed, as paying soldiers' wages is part of the reason for the tax in the first place.
textByHashes.398e630b201a29f642f76af60130484f7c7c06c7: Once you have finished collecting the taxes, come and speak to me again.
textByHashes.ca727de7d896292987be0cdb4ce3444d9a89d023: Thank you for helping our fine city .
textByHashes.657c15f5cc1b03c5511d386652c1f912671daf24: Well, for the Window Tax, only those who use a building.
textByHashes.5743f3f282ce7e1c850e4a6334cf03f6dc173306: Go to each of the buildings in town:
textByHashes.0e7bd060b6783259e2db549709c1c737474b4002: The armourer's hut and the weaponsmith's hut, the eating hall, and the fish shop; all these buildings need to be taxed. The royal hall doesn't need to be taxed, nor the bank or any empty buildings.
textByHashes.0f2699b3e42cf834a148f1ac455e4e416733e9b2: Count the number of windows the building has and then ask one of the people who works there to pay the tax.
textByHashes.8be0cde57afb439b82b81ff9ab7d40ab57ca0afb: The tax is currently 1000gp per window.
textByHashes.bc476781cda81985454987eeed9b653271499ddb: As you do so your tax bag will fill up slowly. When you've taxed everyone you can, come back here and talk to me or the King.
textByHashes.b1fe7d363e1ccb5dfd2f091ea1ff2aab3b0884c6: Don't give me the tax bag until you have collected tax from everyone!
textByHashes.55a0418913cff6fb1080aa5d380a2262e8f8c90b: Well for the Beard Tax, talk to anyone who works in the town; shopkeepers and the like. Don't ask anyone else, as they won't have the money to be taxed! Also don't bother with the bank manager - he has plenty of
textByHashes.d5a1bfd1dd16f637b023b0251296b72086f73069: money, but seems most adept at keeping it.
textByHashes.aa43f3a963a120398c6e706b8d355f6c1652d5a5: So, talk to each of the following and assess whether they are taxable or not.
textByHashes.2fc8ba0c7c9d51d18be7500c69958fd6eddca15a: Raum Urda-Stein trades armour and Hring Hring trades ores. Skuli Myrka trades in weapons, Vanligga Gastfrihet looks after the food hall, Flosi Dalksson sells raw fish and Keepa Kettilon supposedly cooks - though
textByHashes.f4a614f906a3a41675b65089bbcf0efc68ad75cc: I haven't seen him actually cook anything for months.
textByHashes.7bd6c1243e1048cd5e0364004dab943ecb5fa787: Once you've talked to everyone, come back here and we will check the tax bag again. Hopefully it will be enough to satisfy the King this time.
textByHashes.2881b391dbb4015bcd9dc13251674eb5074aac4d: Thank the gods, we finally have enough.
textByHashes.185178a9da325b13d09f436590ccbfc53284190d: I'm afraid i'm not allowed to talk to you any more. It would be more than my life is worth!
textByHashes.576c80996ae08a8f57b26b5ccad92054c7a6c64f: I would be leaving now if I were you, .
textByHashes.849a5aaa45847361ae596a81b77d80fdc6d60ad8: Yes, your majesty, of course your majesty.
textByHashes.bcf8a63df3831e1cba853ba5ab2e38179d7d4869: Thanks, , you are the first person to stand up to the King's bullying in many a year. Maybe he has learnt something today?
textByHashes.e7704a3d2a4ddf07b9e1a2c05abb7891f7e12507: Fare thee well brave warrior, fare thee well.
textByHashes.b2c9808117ac811b61b6daf2aae56845e08abc40: I hear you killed the Troll King. Thanks you for that, however I'm afraid I can't really talk to you any more, the King would be unhappy!
textByHashes.3b3d53dfa58adcc187b84d7220477bb2fe24e11a: What on earth am I supposed to do with that? Take it away.
